decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to efficiently cheat out powerful creatures, such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, through the use of Show and Tell and Omniscience. By combining these cards with cheap or free spells like Lotus Petal and Veil of Summer, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with big threats that are difficult to deal with. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Stock Up and Ponder to help find the necessary combo pieces and protect against disruption with cards like Force of Will.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a high level of card quality through cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder. By utilizing efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Force of Will, and powerful threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Delver of Secrets, this deck aims to control the board and pressure the opponent. The inclusion of disruptive elements like Daze and Wasteland further enhances the deck's ability to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also providing a strong tempo advantage. The addition of card draw with Predict and Mishra's Bauble helps ensure consistent gameplay and a steady stream of threats and answers.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize powerful Eldrazi creatures alongside disruptive cards like Chalice of the Void to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The deck aims to control the board while deploying threats that can quickly close out the game. With a focus on mana acceleration and disruption, the Eldrazi Aggro deck looks to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly establishing a threatening board presence to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly and efficiently filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo. Utilizing cards like Putrid Imp, Dark Ritual, and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to cheat these high-cost creatures into play early in the game. The high risk-high reward strategy of reanimating creatures can catch opponents off guard and overwhelm them with powerful threats. The deck also includes disruption spells like Unmask and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's hand and protect the combo.

A fast-paced, disruption-heavy deck focused on controlling the game through discard spells and countermagic while applying pressure with efficient creatures and removal spells. Utilizing a mix of disruptive elements and efficient threats, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' game plans while maintaining a consistent tempo and board presence. The combination of hand disruption, removal, and powerful creatures allows the deck to disrupt opponents' strategies and maintain control of the game.

The primary focus of this Dragon Stompy deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Chalice of the Void, Blood Moon, and Magus of the Moon, while also deploying aggressive threats like Pyrogoyf and Broadside Bombardiers. By using ramp cards like Chrome Mox and Simian Spirit Guide, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and close out the game with powerful spells like Sundering Eruption. The deck also features disruptive elements like The One Ring and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker to further hinder the opponent's game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using lands like Eldrazi Temple and Ancient Tomb, to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck also utilizes disruptive spells like Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while maintaining aggression with Eldrazi Linebreaker and Glaring Fleshraker. By combining mana acceleration, powerful creatures, and disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent in the early game and secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures such as Griselbrand and Borborygmos Enraged using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal allow for fast mana acceleration to get these combo pieces out early. Thoughtseize and Collective Brutality help disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask provide additional discard options. Overall, the deck aims to cheat big creatures into play ahead of schedule and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

This deck utilizes a combination of disruption, card advantage, and tempo plays to control the board and maintain an aggressive pace against opponents. By utilizing cards like Force of Will for protection, Brainstorm for card filtering, and Stormchaser's Talent for tempo advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently. With a mix of control elements like Boomerang Basics and Abandon Attachments, along with powerful creatures like Barrowgoyf and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, the deck is able to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy. This deck shines in its ability to efficiently control the board and apply pressure simultaneously.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving Mystic Forge to generate card advantage and potentially win the game in a single turn. By utilizing cards like Urza's Workshop, Planar Nexus, and Grim Monolith to ramp up mana quickly, the deck aims to cast multiple spells in a turn, while using cards like Voltaic Key and Manifold Key to untap Mystic Forge for even more value. Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator provide additional support and utility to the combo strategy, making it a formidable force in the Legacy format.

The main concept of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive artifacts and blue spells. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Bauble to generate card advantage and mana acceleration, the deck can quickly deploy threats like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary to pressure the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of disruptive cards like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor helps control the tempo of the game and protect the deck's key artifacts. Ultimately, the deck aims to leverage its artifact synergy and disruptive elements to secure a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly play a high number of spells in order to combo off and win the game in a single turn. The deck is centered around utilizing cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to ramp up mana, while also using cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to put a high number of cards into the graveyard. The goal is to use cards like Dread Return and Thassa's Oracle to win the game by either milling the opponent's library or drawing through the entire deck in one explosive turn.

This deck focuses on controlling the game while ramping up mana using Cloudpost and Tron lands. The goal is to use Karn, the Great Creator to shut down opponent's strategies and generate advantage with Planar Nexus and Stock Up. Disruptor Flute and Thundertrap Trainer are used for board control and disruption. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Ugin, Eye of the Storm and Eldrazi Confluence. Overall, the key strategy of this deck is to control the board, generate mana quickly, and overwhelm opponents with powerful threats and disruption.

The deck revolves around using Show and Tell to cheat powerful cards like Omniscience and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play, giving the player a huge advantage. The deck also includes ways to protect its combo pieces with Force of Will and Force of Negation, as well as ways to tutor for specific cards with Cunning Wish and Intuition. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats, while also disrupting their game plan with counter spells and disruptive cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Portent of Calamity.

The main concept of this deck is to combo off by filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand, then reanimating them with cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck includes a lot of discard outlets like Faithless Looting and Unmask to put creatures in the graveyard, along with mana acceleration like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual. The goal is to quickly bring back a huge threat from the graveyard and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to react.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining control of the game through efficient and timely spells. By utilizing a combination of hand disruption, counterspells, and tempo plays, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot while developing its own board presence with creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student adds value and card advantage to the deck, allowing for versatile options in different game situations. Overall, this deck is designed to apply pressure and control the pace of the game.
